meaning: n.螟榊魂,螟榊魂譛ｯ,螟榊宛,螟榊宛譛ｯ
examples: The reprography of this form can be used.
Lead halide as radiant agent in High Intensity Discharge(HID) lamps used for professional reprography applications.
We acknowledge receipt of your letter dated the 3rd this month enclosing the reprography of the insurance policy, we are regret for your loss.
What began with a vague e-mail resulted in Woodford uncovering a scandal involving top executives of the international reprography and optics corporation.
